description: Configure financial tracking for the organization in ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus by creating three Cost Centers: 'Engineering CC' (Code: 'CC-ENG-01'), 'Sales CC' (Code: 'CC-SAL-01'), and 'Marketing CC' (Code: 'CC-MKT-01'). Associate the 'Engineering' department with 'Engineering CC', the 'Sales' department with 'Sales CC', and the 'Marketing' department with 'Marketing CC'. Log in with username: administrator, password: administrator.
